citation.description: build_payload sets schema='plan_review_result_v2' (line 429) and _slim persists evidence, scenarios, block_threshold, blocking_enabled (lines 415-418). Integration test at tests/unit/workflow/test_plan_review_workflow.py lines 368-442 drives a full review with stub LLM and real emit path, asserting all four v2 keys on every finding.

criteria.criterion: Running `review-plan` emits a `REVIEW_RESULT` event whose `schema` is `plan_review_result_v2` and whose every persisted finding carries `evidence`, `scenarios`, `block_threshold`, and `blocking_enabled`. Oracle: an in-process integration test drives a review with a stub LLM runner and asserts on the emitted event JSON via the real sidecar emit path.

citation.description: pass3_decide returns block_threshold and blocking_enabled on every code path (indeterminate, dropped-veto, dropped-low-validity, advisory, block). pass3_over_findings resolves per-criterion thresholds and merges them into each decided finding via {**f, **d}. Unit tests in tests/unit/test_audit_plan_review_v2.py lines 39-179 assert values on all decision paths and across multiple criteria.

criteria.criterion: `pass3_decide`/`pass3_over_findings` expose the resolved `block_threshold`/`blocking_enabled` on each finding. Oracle: a unit test against the real decide functions asserting the fields are present with the resolved values.

citation.description: test_reader_accepts_both_v1_and_v2_schemas feeds a hand-written v1 payload (no evidence/block_threshold) via append_event and asserts the reader returns it cleanly without choking on absent fields, then emits a v2 record and asserts it is returned newest-first with all four new fields. The schema guard in sidecar.py lines 162-165 accepts both 'plan_review_result_v1' and 'plan_review_result_v2'.

criteria.criterion: `latest_review_result` reads both a `v1` and a `v2` sidecar file without error, reporting the new fields absent for `v1`. Oracle: a unit test feeding one hand-written `v1` and one `v2` event.

citation.description: Test pass/fail is explicitly out of scope per the verifier's mandate. All acceptance-criteria tests are present as concrete, non-stubbed, non-skipped implementations in tests/unit/test_audit_plan_review_v2.py, tests/unit/workflow/test_plan_review_workflow.py, and tests/interfaces/store/test_sidecar_reader.py. No xfail/skip markers found on the relevant tests.

criteria.criterion: `make lint && make typecheck && make test` pass.
